offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inconsistent accounting entries cause cash flow gaps. We convert vendor payment remittance data into accounting entries instead of manual entry and reconciliation of accounting data.
problem: inconsistent accounting entries from vendor payment remittance data
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools sharing
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for vendor payments
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
